title: tarenna quocensis var. quocensis
intro: Tarenna quocensis var. quocensis is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a type of flowering plant found in Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Tarenna quocensis var. quocensis is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be administered orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
